parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.company_name, a.niche, a.business_model, a.gtm_summary,
  a.profile_complete, a.strategy_complete,
  c.brand_voice, c.icp, c.tone, c.value_props
FROM ai_operator_configs a
LEFT JOIN user_ai_config c ON c.user_id = a.user_id
WHERE a.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
SELECT system_prompt FROM operator_prompts WHERE component = 'intake_agent' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO ai_operator_configs (
  user_id, company_name, niche, business_model, gtm_summary, profile_complete
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  {{ $json.profile.company_name ? `'${$json.profile.company_name}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.profile.niche ? `'${$json.profile.niche}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.profile.business_model ? `'${$json.profile.business_model}'` : 'NULL' }},
  NULL,
  {{ $json.profile.profile_complete }}
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET
  company_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.company_name, ai_operator_configs.company_name),
  niche = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.niche, ai_operator_configs.niche),
  business_model = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.business_model, ai_operator_configs.business_model),
  profile_complete = EXCLUDED.profile_complete,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING user_id, profile_complete

INSERT INTO user_ai_config (
  user_id, company_name, niche, tone, icp, value_props
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.user_id }}',
  {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.company_name ? `'${$('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.company_name}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.niche ? `'${$('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.niche}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.tone ? `'${$('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.tone}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.icp_summary ?? '') }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.profile.value_props ?? []) }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET
  company_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.company_name, user_ai_config.company_name),
  niche = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.niche, user_ai_config.niche),
  tone = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.tone, user_ai_config.tone),
  icp = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.icp, user_ai_config.icp),
  value_props = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.value_props, user_ai_config.value_props),
  updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO n8n_error_log (workflow_name, error_message, error_node, execution_id)
VALUES ('Intake Agent', '{{ $json.message }}', '{{ $json.node?.name ?? "unknown" }}', '{{ $json.execution?.id ?? "" }}')
